name: C2xIsPacketValid
title: C2xIsPacketValid
description: This function checks, if a received packet has a protocol error. Packets with a protocol error are marked with an error icon in the Trace Window.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that should be checked.
